strongest_truth_surface_for_next_move.name: runtime effective-mode write/read family
strongest_truth_surface_for_next_move.reason: status health payload consumes these surfaces directly or via get_effective_mode and endpoint selection

supporting_but_not_sufficient_surfaces.name: selected_backend_snapshot
supporting_but_not_sufficient_surfaces.reason: fresh and valid participation evidence, but bounded to selector truth only

supporting_but_not_sufficient_surfaces.name: stable_runtime_consumer_snapshot
supporting_but_not_sufficient_surfaces.reason: historical activation evidence that status may use only when live runtime remains stable

decision.why_not_stable_runtime_ownership_restora: the exact offending write surface family is already localized to sync-owned managed writes, with runtime-effective-mode.txt as the primary authoritative seam and mirrored state/config writes as supporting seams
decision.why_not_stop: surface ownership is concrete enough to repair without guessed auth-source truth
